author: lOrm
content: Fixed via src/hooks/mod.rs: added HookEvent::is_deny_intent() (PreToolUse + PermissionRequest only); matches_entry now takes the event and fail-closes (returns true) on regex compile/match errors for deny-intent events, fail-opens for observe events. Both paths emit tracing::warn! with structured event=, pattern=, error=, fail_closed= fields. Regression tests: pre_tool_use_with_malformed_matcher_fails_closed_and_blocks, post_tool_use_with_malformed_matcher_fails_open_and_skips, pre_tool_use_matcher_failure_emits_warn_with_fail_closed_field, post_tool_use_matcher_failure_emits_warn_with_fail_closed_false, is_deny_intent_covers_pre_tool_use_and_permission_request_only. cargo test --lib: 1510 passed (baseline 1495 + 6 new). cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings: exit 0.
